name: FIFA Winner Skill
description: World Cup entertainment-prediction skill with evidence planning, multi-layer match analysis, play cards, poster prompts, and post-match evaluation. Designed for host agents (Codex, Claude Code, etc.) to call as a domain-specific tool set.

interfaces.notes: Primary interface; call from repository root with --root .
Runtime server is intentionally deferred; the card and handoff contract are ready for a wrapper.
Tools, resources, and prompts are cataloged for a future MCP server wrapper.
Use TOOL_CATALOG.json, HANDOFFS.md, GUARDRAILS.md, and TRACE_EVENTS.md when building a wrapper.

skills.name: World Cup edition setup
skills.description: Initialize edition-scoped match ledger, source registry, wiki, and SQLite query index.
examples: Initialize the 2026 World Cup knowledge base.

skills.name: Evidence-aware entertainment prediction
skills.description: Generate locked pre-match predictions with data score, Tianji overlay, market/evidence context, scenario analysis, and decision audit.
examples: Predict Mexico vs South Africa with visible evidence gaps.

skills.name: Public default and user-local overlay
skills.description: Merge public facts, bundled AI Octopus default predictions, and user-generated predictions into a dashboard view where user_local replaces octopus_default by match_id.
examples: Show default predictions on a fresh install, then replace them when the user generates local predictions.

skills.name: Shareable report and poster prompting
skills.description: Turn structured prediction reports into human report prompts, play cards, and poster prompts when explicitly requested.
examples: Build a showdown poster prompt for match 2026-GA-01.

skills.name: Post-match evaluation
skills.description: Evaluate locked predictions after final scores are recorded and aggregate calibration dashboards.
examples: Evaluate all 2026-06-11 predictions after final scores.

skills.name: Portable skill export
skills.description: Export the repo, skill docs, schemas, examples, tests, and selected edition knowledge base for another runtime.
examples: Export a standalone 2026 bundle for another agent.

safety.disclaimer: 娱乐预测，非投注建议；不得作为投注、购彩或资金决策依据。

storage_policy.public_knowledge: Reusable facts and bundled defaults live under wiki/public/<edition>/.
storage_policy.user_local_state: User-generated predictions, local evidence, evaluations, run traces, overrides, dashboard output, and caches live under wiki/<edition>/data/.
storage_policy.dashboard_merge_view: prediction_visual_dashboard.py merges public facts, octopus_default predictions, and user_local predictions by match_id.
storage_policy.canonical_artifacts: JSON and Markdown files under wiki/<edition>/ and wiki/public/<edition>/
storage_policy.conflict_policy: Prefer locked JSON reports over SQLite rows and report any mismatch.

prediction_contract.tianji_time_rule: Calculate Tianji from match-local venue time when venue timezone is known; display converted time separately.
prediction_contract.evaluation_policy: Report result direction, exact score, and total-goals hits separately. Direction hit alone is a partial hit, not full success.

recommended_a2a_response_shape.safety: 娱乐预测，非投注建议；不得作为投注、购彩或资金决策依据。
